invite.subject: You've been invited to {tenantName} on Ramola WMS

invite.loginLink: Log in and change your password →
invite.footer: This invite was sent from Ramola WMS. If you weren't expecting this, you can ignore it.

setPassword.instruction: Click the link below to set your password:
setPassword.footer: This link expires in 48 hours. If you didn't expect this invitation, you can ignore it.
